impact: This advances task checkbox-93 by committing a fixture-only DevHub workflow snapshot for demolition draft review that captures semantic selectors, required fields, upload controls, validation messages, save-for-later state, and exact confirmation gates without live DevHub access or private values.
summary: Add a redacted mocked DevHub demolition application draft-review snapshot fixture plus deterministic fixture validation.
target_task: Task checkbox-93: Add a mocked DevHub workflow snapshot fixture for demolition application draft review that records semantic selectors, required fields, upload controls, validation messages, save-for-later state, and exact confirmation gates using only redacted values.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
